qualification.education_qualification: M. Pharm (Pharmaceutics) / M. Tech., / M.Sc or equivalent degree in Pharmaceutical Science/Technology, Medical Nanotechnology, Biomedical Engineering, Biotechnology
qualification.details: M. Pharm (Pharmaceutics) / M. Tech., / M.Sc or equivalent degree in Pharmaceutical Science/Technology, Medical Nanotechnology, Biomedical Engineering, Biotechnology.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the SASTRA Project Assistant - I Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of SASTRA to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SASTRA Project Assistant – I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the SASTRA Project Assistant – I position is 05-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant – I post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess an M. Pharm (Pharmaceutics) / M. Tech., / M.Sc or equivalent degree in Pharmaceutical Science/Technology, Medical Nanotechnology, Biomedical Engineering, or Biotechnology.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant – I position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant – I post at SASTRA Deemed University.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant – I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 29,700 Per Month, which includes Rs. 27,000 plus 10% HRA.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an Online Entrance Examination followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for SASTRA Project Assistant – I recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to apply online through the official SASTRA website.

faq.question: Q8. Where is SASTRA Deemed University located?
faq.answer: SASTRA Deemed University is located in Thanjavur, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 613401.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job opportunity at SASTRA Deemed University.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed via the "Important Links" section of this article, under the "Official Notification PDF" description.
